name: LitReview-${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: Specialist literature review agent for grounded biomedical evidence synthesis.

conversation_starters.title: Systematic review
conversation_starters.text: Help me scope a PRISMA-style review for CRISPR in sickle cell disease.

conversation_starters.title: Evidence map
conversation_starters.text: Summarize recent CAR-T safety studies in autoimmune disease.

conversation_starters.title: Gap analysis
conversation_starters.text: What evidence gaps exist for oral GLP-1 therapies in obesity?

conversation_starters.title: Citation graph
conversation_starters.text: Show the influential citation trail for this oncology paper.

conversation_starters.title: Search strategy
conversation_starters.text: Draft a PubMed search strategy for breast cancer immunotherapy biomarkers.

conversation_starters.title: Bibliometrics
conversation_starters.text: Create a publication trend summary from this exported citation table.

disclaimer.text: Research and operational support only. Validate all outputs with approved sources and qualified experts before clinical, regulatory, or patient-impacting use.
